content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

July 29, 2003

A.G. Velasquez
1321 W. Devers Street
West Covina, CA 91790

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-158

Dear Mr. Velasquez:

This letter confirms the receipt of your July 22, 2003, request for advice regarding an unnamed city council member. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations 18329(b)(8)(B), unless you identify the council member and are writing as his authorized representative, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis.

I enclose a copy of regulation 18329 for your review, as well as our pamphlet, "Campaign Contributions May Cause Conflicts for Appointees and Commissioners," § 84308 and regulation 18438.1, for clarification on this issue. You may contact our toll-free help line with general questions you may have at 1-866-275-3772.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

Enclosure
JWW/jg
